privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.contactText: If you have questions about the privacy policy, please contact:

collection.title: 1. Information Collection
collection.description: LearnWell collects personal information when you register for an account, including:
items: Full name, email, phone number
Academic information and progress
Platform usage data (study time, completed assignments)
Payment information (if using paid services)

usage.title: 2. Information Usage
items: Personalize the learning experience with AI
Provide progress reports for parents and teachers
Improve platform quality
Send notifications about courses and system updates

protection.title: 3. Information Protection
protection.description: LearnWell is committed to protecting your data with:
items: SSL/TLS encryption for all transmitted data
Secure storage on world-class cloud infrastructure
Strict access control
Regular data backups

rights.title: 4. User Rights
items: Access and edit personal information
Request account and data deletion
Opt-out of marketing emails
Export your learning data

sharing.title: 5. Information Sharing
sharing.description: LearnWell does not sell your personal information. We only share data with:
items: Teachers and parents (according to authorized roles)
Technology partners (only necessary data, with non-disclosure agreements)
Legal authorities (when legally required)

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.contactText: If you have questions about the terms of service, please contact:

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.description: By accessing and using the LearnWell platform, you agree to comply with the following terms and conditions. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.

account.title: 2. User Accounts
account.description: When registering an account, you commit to:
items: Providing accurate and complete information
Keeping your login credentials secure
Being responsible for all activities under your account
Notifying us immediately if unauthorized access is detected
account.note: Students under 13 require parental consent to use the platform.

rights.title: 3. Right to Use
rights.description: LearnWell grants you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable right to:
items: Access and use the platform for personal learning purposes
Download learning materials for personal use
Participate in learning activities and the community

restrictions.title: 4. Prohibited Behaviors
items: Copy or distribute content without permission
Use the platform for unauthorized commercial purposes
Attack, hack, or disrupt the system
Upload content that violates the law, is offensive, or spam
Share accounts with others
Use bots or unauthorized automation tools

intellectualPropery.title: 5. Intellectual Property
intellectualPropery.description: All content on LearnWell (lectures, videos, assignments, source code) is the property of LearnWell or licensed partners. You may not copy, modify, or distribute content without written permission.

liability.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
liability.description: LearnWell provides the platform "as is" and does not guarantee that the service will be uninterrupted or error-free. We are not responsible for:
items: Data loss due to technical errors
Indirect damages arising from platform use
Content posted by other users

changes.title: 7. Changes to Terms
changes.description: LearnWell reserves the right to update these terms at any time. We will notify you via email or platform notification. Continued use after changes implies acceptance of the new terms.
